visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a static close-up of a high-contrast promotional poster featuring a smartphone graphic. The text on the poster is large and stylized in yellow and white, set against a red-to-blue gradient background. The lighting is bright and even. (2) A middle-aged man wearing a blue Lacoste t-shirt, a brown patterned flat cap, and glasses stands outdoors in front of a retail store. He gestures energetically with his hands and points toward the camera while speaking. Animated text and sparkling graphics frequently appear around his head. (3) Inside a brightly lit retail store, the man is seated at a white consultation desk opposite a female staff member with long black hair. She is wearing a white short-sleeved top. They engage in an active discussion with the man leaning forward and the staff member typing. (4) Close-up shots show various smartphone packaging boxes, including the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, iPhone 16 Pro, and Oppo Reno12 F. Bright yellow and red price graphics overlay the boxes to highlight savings and local opening prices. (5) The camera cuts back to the man outside the store, standing near the entrance. He continues to speak with high energy, using varied hand signals to emphasize his points. The background shows the glass facade of the 'miko' store and the street beyond. (6) The video concludes with a low-angle tracking shot of the building's exterior, focusing on the large red 'miko' logo and signage. A white scooter is parked in front of the glass entrance before a final promotional graphic with a QR code and website address appears.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the store, 1 female staff member interacting with him inside.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a light blue Lacoste t-shirt, a brown/tan flat cap, and multiple bead bracelets on his wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a busy urban sidewalk with retail signage and a modern interior mobile phone store. The store interior features white counters, product display shelves, and bright overhead lighting. The exterior shows building facades and parked scooters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track begins with an immediate upbeat, high-tempo electronic dance music track featuring a prominent synthesized beat and bright, energetic textures. The mix is clear with high spectral brightness. There are no vocals or sound effects in this initial second. (2) A male speaker's voice enters with extremely high energy and arousal. His speech is fast, professional, and enunciated as he introduces the retail store. Frequent high-frequency 'whoosh' and 'pop' sound effects occur every few seconds, tightly synchronized with the on-screen text graphics. (3) The acoustic texture shifts as the male speaker engages in dialogue with a female voice. The female speaker has a friendly, mid-range pitch with clear articulation. A very faint mechanical keyboard clicking sound is heard underneath their conversation. The BGM maintains a steady, driving rhythm. (4) During the price reveal segment, several metallic 'ding' and sharp 'hit' sound effects are inserted to emphasize key discounts and special offers. The male and female voices alternate quickly, maintaining a lively conversational flow while the electronic BGM continues uninterrupted. (5) The male speaker resumes a high-energy monologue at a louder volume intensity. His voice is dominant and projected. Rapid-fire synthetic transition sound effects indicate frequent scene changes. The spectral balance remains bright and crisp with no noticeable audio distortion. (6) In the final phase, the BGM remains at a consistent level as a faint outdoor environmental hum is introduced. A final resonant 'ding' sound effect coincides with the display of the final promotional slogan, ending the audio sequence with a definitive high-arousal impact.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> In-store verification -> Value Proposition -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the grand opening of the Miko mobile retail store in Hsinchu. The video aims to attract customers by showcasing significant price reductions on flagship smartphones (Samsung, iPhone) and highlighting opening-day gifts and services.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically visits the store, interacts with the staff to confirm promotional prices, and actively encourages viewers to visit the physical store or website.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density editing style characteristic of social media shorts, combining a well-known tech influencer with rapid-fire information to maximize engagement.
